od_description: Pampore (Pulwama) ↔ Sonwar Bagh / central Srinagar, via Pantha Chowk. A Pampore–Srinagar corridor on the SE approach.
stops_verdict: Strong stops along the corridor incl. central Srinagar; genuine boarding points.
narrative: A clearly permitted Pampore ↔ central-Srinagar corridor (82 runs / 11 drivers). The Pampore approach is served by a family of similar permits — FDR-320 'Parimpora to Pampore', FDR-341 'LD to Pampore', FDR-370 'Srinagar to Pampore' — all ~0.55-0.56 overlap. Best generic endpoint match is FDR-370 (observed Srinagar end = Sonwar Bagh/central). Not informal; the specific permit within the Pampore family is the only ambiguity.
evidence_used: geocoded endpoints: Pampore (A, Pulwama), Sonwar Bagh (B, central Srinagar)
candidate Pampore family FDR-320/341/370 all ~0.55-0.56 overlap
data_quality_flags: specific permit ambiguous within the Pampore–Srinagar family
implied_headway 325 min is a partial-adoption artifact
